title: AlgoVault Integrations Manifest
description: Single source of truth for the official AlgoVault × <Exchange> integration tutorials shipped under docs/integrations/<slug>.md + examples/<slug>/. Generator (scripts/build_landing.mjs) emits Use Cases cards / mirror metadata / READMEs / llms.txt entries from this file. Mirror to skills/manifest.json.

slug.description: Kebab-case identifier; becomes URL slug, directory name, and UTM campaign suffix.

name.description: Human-readable exchange name with correct casing (e.g. 'OKX', 'Bybit'). Used in titles, hero text, JSON-LD.

package.description: Canonical package identifier as published. May be an npm package name, a GitHub org/repo (for non-npm distributions like Binance Skills Hub), or a similar canonical reference.

package_install.description: The exact one-liner a developer pastes into their terminal to install/configure the exchange's MCP server. Must be runnable verbatim (no placeholders).

package_version.description: Exact semver of the package_install version OR `verified-YYYY-MM-DD` for non-versioned distributions (e.g. Binance Skills Hub which uses `npx skills add <repo-url>`).

repo_url.description: Canonical GitHub repo URL for the exchange's MCP / Skills Hub / Trade Kit.

docs_url.description: Canonical docs URL for the exchange's MCP product (announcement page, README, or CLI reference).

demo_flag.description: Exact env var or CLI flag that enables demo/testnet mode, verbatim from the upstream README.

tutorial_url_repo.description: GitHub blob URL to the canonical tutorial markdown source (algovault-skills/docs/integrations/<slug>.md).

mirror_url_web.description: algovault.com mirror URL where the rendered HTML version of the tutorial lives.

demo_url.description: GitHub tree URL for the runnable demo (algovault-skills/examples/<slug>/).

devto_url.description: Dev.to article URL once published, or MANUAL_PENDING/MANUAL_SUBMITTED status.

community_submission_url.description: Upstream community submission URL (Issue/PR/Discussion) or status enum.

status.description: Aggregate distribution status. LIVE = mirror+tutorial+demo are all reachable.

launch_date.description: When the upstream MCP / Skills Hub / Trade Kit launched (ISO YYYY-MM-DD).

icon.description: Single emoji character used as the card icon on the landing page (no third-party logo licensing).

logo.description: Self-hosted exchange logo asset for use on /integrations + Use Cases section (WEBSITE-REFRESH-CLEANUP-W1 R5). Files live in landing/assets/logos/ and are deployed to /var/www/algovault/assets/ via deploy.yml.

path.description: Web path to the logo asset (e.g. /assets/logos/binance.svg). PNG ok for fallbacks where SVG unavailable.

invert.description: If true, renders with `class="... invert"` to make black-on-light wordmarks visible on the dark navy theme.

tagline.description: One-line MOAT-led copy used in cards: composite verdict + the exchange's specific execution capability.

recipes.description: Kebab-case identifiers for the 3 tutorial recipes. Used to generate per-mirror schema markup + structured data.
